title: U.S. immigration policy tracker | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Trump immigration policy tracker
Use this policy tracker to stay informed of business immigration policies resulting from President Trump’s executive orders, memoranda and proclamations. Click on the topics below for the latest news and bookmark this page for regular updates.
To better understand how these immigration updates could impact your foreign national workforce, in-house immigration and mobility professionals are invited to join BAL Community at no cost.

## U.S. immigration policy areas

### Work visas/authorization
Get updates on policies impacting employment authorization and work permit applications.
Get updates on policies impacting the H-1B visa program and H-1B visa holders.
Find out about country-specific parole and Temporary Protected Status updates.

### International students
Understand the latest policy changes for international students and F-1 visas.

### Travel & visa restrictions
Know the latest U.S. travel and visa restrictions and sanctions by country.

### Birthright citizenship
Learn about the latest developments on birthright citizenship.
Stay current on USCIS news and recent developments regarding DACA.
Trump Gold Card: News and insights on obtaining this exclusive permanent residency visa.
Get clarity. Learn about changing immigration policies and the impact to your business.
Get answers. Discover benchmarking insights, connect with peers and gain access to immigration experts and policy makers in special online events. Get started. Join the leading resource for immigration professionals to get actionable intelligence.

## How we help clients navigate policy changes
Learn how BAL uses our legal expertise, government connections and advanced technology platforms to support clients respond quickly to policy changes.
